prestazioni: Engine swap to a Renault 8 Gordini (Type 688) 1.3L inline-4 with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo connecting rods) and a custom camshaft profile by Schrick (284° duration, 11.5mm lift) for high-RPM power delivery, paired with a Weber 45 DCOE carburetor setup and a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed Engineering

Lightweight flywheel (AP Racing 10.5lb) and uprated clutch (Sachs Performance 240mm twin-disc) to handle the increased torque, combined with a close-ratio 5-speed gearbox (Renault R8 Gordini Type 354) with a Quaife ATB differential for improved traction

Suspension overhaul with custom-valved Öhlins DFV coilovers (adjustable damping and ride height) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for the rear trailing arms, paired with a reinforced front subframe brace (Alpine-specific design by Gillet) and spherical bearings (Rose Joints) for the steering rack mounts
estetica: Full carbon fiber body kit by Fibre De Verre (Alpine A108-specific panels, including widened front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a ducktail spoiler) with a custom metallic blue paint scheme (PPG Deltron DBC9000) and gold-pinstripe accents by Stripes Unlimited

Bespoke aluminum fuel filler cap (Alpine-branded, machined by Radium Engineering) and lightweight magnesium wheels (OZ Racing Ultraleggera 13x6 front, 13x7 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (165/55R13 front, 185/60R13 rear) for period-correct grip

Custom interior with Recaro SRD bucket seats (Alpine-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in black Alcantara with blue stitching, a Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter), and a full roll cage (T45 steel, bolt-in design by Safety Devices) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)
